summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Portfolio Detail Page feature. All backend APIs (12/12 tests) and frontend UI components working correctly.
passed_tests: GET /api/portfolios/{id} returns portfolio with all required fields
Portfolio has sales_text populated (pf_conservative01)
Portfolio has safety_guarantee populated (pf_conservative01)
Portfolio has returns_by_term for calculator
GET /api/portfolios/{id} returns 404 for non-existent portfolio
GET /api/portfolios/{id}/stats returns investors_count, total_invested, total_profit
Portfolio stats includes profit_percent calculation
GET /api/portfolios/{id}/stats returns 404 for non-existent portfolio
GET /api/portfolios returns list of portfolios
All portfolios have duration_months array
Returns by term keys match available duration_months
Expected return exists as fallback for calculator
Portfolio detail page loads at /portfolio/{portfolioId}
Hero section displays portfolio name, description, risk badge
Stats cards show: investors count (7), total invested ($65,000), total profit (+$5,700)
Calculator shows correct returns based on selected term (6mo=10%, 12mo=12%)
Duration selection buttons work correctly
Investment amount input works and shows expected profit
Tabs (Overview, Assets, Performance) switch correctly
Asset allocation pie chart renders with legend
Assets tab shows list of assets with allocation percentages
Performance tab shows line chart with historical data
Sales text section displays marketing content
Safety guarantee section displays with license info and badges
Returns by term section displays (6mo=10%, 12mo=12%, 24mo=15%)
Invest button (hero) navigates to /invest/{portfolioId} when logged in
Invest button redirects to /login when not authenticated
Back button navigates to /portfolios
Bottom CTA invest button visible and functional
seed_data_creation: None - used existing portfolio pf_conservative01 with sales_text and safety_guarantee
context_for_next_testing_agent: Portfolio detail page feature is fully functional. Backend endpoints GET /api/portfolios/{id} and GET /api/portfolios/{id}/stats are working. Frontend displays all sections: hero with stats, calculator, tabs (Overview/Assets/Performance), sales text, safety guarantee, returns by term, and bottom CTA. Navigation buttons (back, invest) work correctly.

components: Hero section with portfolio info and stats

features: Expected profit calculation based on term-specific rates
